summary: We cleared a stuck payment attempt on Chaska's Spring balance ($383.12). Your last try used Stripe Link, which could not complete on that checkout — please use a debit or credit card instead (not Link or Apple Pay if prompted).
Sign in and pay: open Payments, click Pay Now on Chaska's row, and enter your card details. Or use Pay in Full from the same page if you prefer one checkout.
Easton's Spring enrollment is already paid in full. Only Chaska's $383.12 remains.
If you still see an error after refreshing the page, reply to this email and we'll help right away.
